caption: The video captures a group of men walking outdoors in a sunlit area with greenery and trees in the background. Several men are dressed in traditional Indian white clothing, while one man in the foreground wears a dark sleeveless vest over a light-colored shirt. They are moving forward together across a light-colored paved area. On-screen graphics include a red banner at the top with the text "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and a red ticker at the bottom that reads "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है". Small inset portrait photos of various men are displayed on the left and right sides, labeled with names such as "डिग्री CM", "सप्रत चौधरी", "विजय सिन्हा", "मंत्री", "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", and "विजय चौधरी". A small logo and a timestamp of "10:07 PM" are visible in the bottom right corner. The movement is gradual across the frames, with the men shifting slightly as they walk forward.
